name: Django Framework Exceptions
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Thomas Patzke
SIGMA Title: Django Framework Exceptions
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious Django web application framework exceptions that could indicate exploitation attempts

False positives:
- Application bugs

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%suspiciousoperation%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%disallowedhost%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%disallowedmodeladminlookup%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%disallowedmodeladmintofield%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%disallowedredirect%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%invalidsessionkey%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%requestdatatoobig%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%suspiciousfileoperation%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%suspiciousmultipartform%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%suspicioussession%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%toomanyfieldssent%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%permissiondenied%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Django Framework Exceptions on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%suspiciousoperation%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%disallowedhost%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%disallowedmodeladminlookup%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%disallowedmodeladmintofield%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%disallowedredirect%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%invalidsessionkey%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%requestdatatoobig%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%suspiciousfileoperation%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%suspiciousmultipartform%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%suspicioussession%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%toomanyfieldssent%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%permissiondenied%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Thomas Patzke SIGMA Title: Django Framework Exceptions SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious Django web application framework exceptions that could indicate exploitation attempts  False positives: - Application bugs  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
